title: BEM-840 billing vs queue
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:01 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
# Evidence from repository state and queue processor artifacts.
b827=load('governance/state/bem827_fix_bad_dispatch_queue_json.json')
b829=load('governance/state/bem829_verify_dispatch_after_json_fix.json')
b839=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
results=[]
rd=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
if rd.exists():
    for p in sorted(rd.glob('*.status.json')):
        results.append({'path':str(p),'preview':read(p)[:700]})
runner_alive_evidence=[]
for bem in ['bem827','bem828','bem829','bem830','bem831','bem832','bem833','bem834','bem835','bem836','bem837','bem838','bem839']:

conclusion='not_billing_for_jsondecode_screenshot'
reason='The observed failure was JSON parsing in workflow_dispatch_queue. Codex Runner continued to create commits after the incident, so the shown error was not an Actions-minutes exhaustion symptom. Billing can still be a separate external blocker only if GitHub UI/billing page says minutes/quota exhausted.'
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':conclusion,'reason':reason,'bad_json_evidence':b827,'post_fix_dispatch_check':b829,'latest_triad_check':b839,'dispatch_results_found':len(results),'dispatch_results_tail':results[-10:],'runner_alive_evidence_tail':runner_alive_evidence[-20:],'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_billing_vs_queue_failure_evidence.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_billing_vs_queue_failure_evidence.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Billing Vs Queue Failure Evidence | NOT_BILLING_FOR_JSONDECODE_SCREENSHOT'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: continue proof triad repair. Billing must be checked separately only through GitHub billing/Actions usage UI or explicit billing error in run logs. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Conclusion: not billing for JSONDecodeError screenshot. Continue proof triad repair.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem840_billing_vs_queue_failure_evidence.json','governance/reports/bem840_billing_vs_queue_failure_evidence.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
